evals.prompt: Create a 10-slide listicle carousel: 5 Cold Email Mistakes That Kill Your Reply Rate. Target audience: B2B founders doing their own outreach. Organic format.

assertions.text: Output references `generateImage` from lib/fal for generating the Jay cover photo via Flux LoRA
Output references `generateWithNanoBanana` or `editWithNanoBanana` from lib/fal for generating inner slides
Output specifies aspect_ratio '3:4' for organic format
Output specifies resolution '1K' (not '2K' or '4K')
Output includes hex color #ED0D51 (hot pink) in prompts for accent text
Prompt templates use light/white background (#FFFFFF or #F8F8F8) — NOT dark #0D0D0D
No prompt mentions any icon, emoji-style graphic, or abstract symbol (no 'icon', 'emoji', 'lightning bolt icon', 'envelope icon', 'chart icon')
No prompt includes a slide counter like '2/10', '3/10', 'N/M' format
No prompt includes visible pixel dimensions like '180px', '50px', '120px' as text to render — safe zones described only as layout constraints like 'generous margins'
Output specifies Big Shoulders as the headline font
Output specifies Manrope as the body font
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
Cover slide includes a 'SWIPE' call-to-action element

No banned AI words in any slide copy (delve, tapestry, realm, landscape, ever-evolving, cutting-edge, robust, transformative, pivotal, vibrant, crucial, compelling, seamless, groundbreaking, leverage, harness, embark, navigate, unveil, facilitate, synergy, game-changer, unlock, unleash, elevate, utilize, endeavour, multifaceted)
No slide copy contains prompt instruction words like 'CRITICAL', 'EXACTLY', 'DO NOT', 'IMPORTANT', 'NOTE', 'MUST' — no prompt leakage into visible copy
No prompt mentions purple, blue, or gradient backgrounds — only white (#FFFFFF), off-white (#F8F8F8), or light gray allowed
Brand text in prompts says exactly '@leadgen' — no mangled variations like '@leadgenjay_official' or '@lead_gen'
The cover slide hook is specific and scroll-stopping — addresses a real pain point
Each inner slide focuses on one distinct mistake (not overlapping or repetitive)
Slide copy is concise and punchy — reads like Instagram, not a blog post
The final slide has a CTA with a comment trigger keyword (e.g., 'Comment EMAILS') or a follow CTA — not just more content

evals.prompt: Create an 8-slide how-to carousel: How to Set Up Your First Cold Email Campaign in 30 Minutes. Target audience: agency owners new to cold outreach. Organic format.

assertions.text: Output references `generateImage` for Flux LoRA Jay cover photo
Output references `editWithNanoBanana` with real screenshot references for inner slides
Output specifies aspect_ratio '3:4'
Output specifies resolution '1K'
Each inner slide has a step number in the prompt
Prompt templates use light/white background (#FFFFFF) — NOT #0D0D0D
No prompt mentions any icon or abstract symbol
No prompt includes slide counters
No prompt includes visible pixel dimensions as rendered text
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
No banned AI words in any slide copy
Inner slide prompts describe realistic screenshots of actual tools (Instantly, Gmail, Google Sheets, etc.) — not illustrations or diagrams
All slide copy words are correctly spelled — no misspellings or garbled text
No slide copy contains prompt instruction words like 'CRITICAL', 'EXACTLY', 'DO NOT', 'IMPORTANT', 'NOTE', 'MUST'
Steps are in logical chronological order
Steps are actionable and specific — mention exact tool names and specific actions
CTA slide has text overlay with comment trigger or follow prompt

evals.prompt: Create a comparison carousel: Cold Calling vs Cold Email in 2026. 9 slides. Target audience: sales teams evaluating outreach methods. Organic format.

assertions.text: Output references `generateWithNanoBanana` or `editWithNanoBanana` for inner slides
Output references `generateImage` for Flux LoRA cover photo
Output specifies aspect_ratio '3:4'
Output specifies resolution '1K'
Prompt templates use light/white background — NOT #0D0D0D
No prompt mentions any icon or abstract symbol
No prompt includes slide counters
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
No banned AI words in any slide copy
No prompt mentions purple, blue, or gradient backgrounds — only white (#FFFFFF), off-white, or light gray allowed
No two inner slides have substantially the same headline or body copy — each slide is distinct
Cover slide has a clear comparison framing (vs, compared to, or split visual)
Comparison points use real data/stats, not strawman arguments
Each comparison slide covers a different dimension (cost, time, scale, etc.)
CTA uses comment trigger keyword or follow prompt

evals.prompt: Create a case-study carousel: How We Booked 47 Calls in 14 Days with Cold Email. 10 slides. Target audience: B2B founders skeptical about cold email. Organic format. Include a screenshot reference of a Stripe dashboard as proof.

assertions.text: Output references `editWithNanoBanana` for compositing screenshot references into slides
Output references `generateImage` for Flux LoRA cover photo
Output references `uploadToFalStorage` for uploading local screenshot assets
Output specifies aspect_ratio '3:4'
Output specifies resolution '1K'
Prompt templates use light/white background — NOT #0D0D0D
No prompt mentions any icon or abstract symbol
No prompt includes slide counters
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
No banned AI words in any slide copy
At least one slide prompt references a real screenshot or proof image via image_urls
No slide copy contains prompt instruction words like 'CRITICAL', 'EXACTLY', 'DO NOT', 'IMPORTANT', 'NOTE', 'MUST'
All slide copy words are correctly spelled — no misspellings or garbled text
Proof slides describe realistic dashboard screenshots (Stripe, analytics, calendar) — not styled text or bar charts
The case study follows a narrative arc: problem -> approach -> results -> takeaway
CTA leverages social proof from the case study

evals.prompt: Create a carousel: The 3 Tools I Use to Get 1,000 Leads/Day. 8 slides. Target audience: cold email practitioners. Organic format. Tools are bolt.new, Instantly, and Claude Code.

assertions.text: Output references `editWithNanoBanana` with real screenshot references for tool slides
Output references `generateImage` for Flux LoRA cover photo
Output specifies aspect_ratio '3:4'
Output specifies resolution '1K'
Prompt templates use light/white background — NOT #0D0D0D
No prompt asks AI to generate or render a company logo — logos must come from real files or be omitted
No prompt mentions any icon or abstract symbol
No prompt includes slide counters
No prompt duplicates a tool name (e.g., showing logo text 'bolt.' AND also writing 'bolt.new' as separate text)
Tool slides describe realistic screenshots of each tool's actual interface — not generic descriptions
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
No banned AI words in any slide copy
All slide copy words are correctly spelled — no misspellings or garbled text
Brand text in prompts says exactly '@leadgen' — no mangled variations like '@leadgenjay_official' or '@lead_gen'
No prompt mentions purple, blue, or gradient backgrounds
Workflow includes checking for real logos in public/brand/ or public/ads/assets/ before generating
CTA uses comment trigger keyword or follow prompt

No slide copy exceeds 15 words
